mapper.insert: insert into t_aircraft_type_deviation (aircraft_type_deviation_id, aircraft_info_id, serial_number, registration_id, utm_id, specific_session_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_start_time, route_deviation_end_time, flight_count) values (#{aircraftTypeDeviationId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{registrationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{utmId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificSessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{routeDeviationAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{routeDeviationStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, #{routeDeviationEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, #{flightCount,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into t_aircraft_type_deviation
aircraft_type_deviation_id,
aircraft_info_id,
serial_number,
registration_id,
utm_id,
specific_session_id,
route_deviation_rate,
route_deviation_amount,
route_deviation_start_time,
route_deviation_end_time,
flight_count,
#{aircraftTypeDeviationId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{registrationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{utmId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{specificSessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{routeDeviationAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{routeDeviationStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE},
#{routeDeviationEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE},
#{flightCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_aircraft_type_deviation
aircraft_info_id = #{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
serial_number = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
registration_id = #{registrationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
utm_id = #{utmId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specific_session_id = #{specificSessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
route_deviation_rate = #{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
route_deviation_amount = #{routeDeviationAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
route_deviation_start_time = #{routeDeviationStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE},
route_deviation_end_time = #{routeDeviationEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE},
flight_count = #{flightCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where aircraft_type_deviation_id = #{aircraftTypeDeviationId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_aircraft_type_deviation set aircraft_info_id = #{aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, serial_number = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, registration_id = #{registrationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, utm_id = #{utmId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specific_session_id = #{specificSessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, route_deviation_rate = #{routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, route_deviation_amount = #{routeDeviationAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, route_deviation_start_time = #{routeDeviationStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, route_deviation_end_time = #{routeDeviationEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, flight_count = #{flightCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} where aircraft_type_deviation_id = #{aircraftTypeDeviationId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select reservation_id, get_location_timestamp, latitude, longitude, altitude, route_deviation_rate, horizontal_deviation, vertical_deviation, uasl_id, uasl_section_id, operator_id, serial_number, registration_id, utm_id, specific_session_id, aircraft_info_id, uasl_administrator_id, end_at, operational_status from v_uasl_design_area_info_deviation where get_location_timestamp >= #{periodStart} and get_location_timestamp < #{periodEnd} order by reservation_id, get_location_timestamp limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
